title: SeptCrawler
description: Upcoming. My own search engine. Currently planning, researching, and working on designing its architecture.

title: WorkshopHub
description: Ongoing. Workshop management platform with registrations, attendance, materials, feedback, and certificates.

title: Priorify
description: Priority-based task manager. Base version (v1.0.0) released. Console-first app. GUI version planned using Qt.

title: URL Shortener
description: A lightweight URL shortening service built using Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Mongoose.

title: MyDayOff
description: A full-stack HR workflow simulation for managing employee (and manager) leave and reimbursement requests and approvals.

title: FinTracker
description: A personal finance tracker app that lets users manage their income and expenses.

title: Karaoke App
description: A console karaoke app that fetches lyrics from the Genius API, downloads song audio from YouTube using yt-dlp, and displays colour-highlighted lyrics in real-time.

title: Survivors (Clone)
description: Learning game development by making a Vampire Survivors clone in Godot. Work in progress.

title: Coin Collector
description: A simple coin collector micro game built in Unity.

title: Snake Game
description: Currently private. The classic snake game I'm writing in C++ for learning and fun.

title: File Deletion Tool
description: A simple tool I made while learning Node.js that lets users delete a specific file by simply typing in its name in the input field and clicking on the delete button.

title: Password Generator
description: A simple password generator web app that lets users copy the generated password(s) to their clipboard.

title: Roll the Dice
description: A dice roller that lets users roll as many dice as they want all at once. Made while learning JavaScript.
